name: io.github.tchen6500/bazi-fortune-hub
title: BaZi Fortune Hub
description: BaZi (八字) MCP gateway + 玄学社区. 12 tools (4 fortune + 5 forum + 3 meta). NOTE: /api/mcp enforces x-api-key auth on all methods (initialize, tools/list, tools/call) — clients must supply FORTUNE_HUB_API_KEY before tools become visible. Use /.well-known/mcp/server-card.json (public, cached 1h) for unauthenticated tool discovery; use /.well-known/mcp.json (public, cached 5min) for live pricing. Entertainment purposes only.
